---
title: 'Course Syllabus <img src="assets/logo.png" height="50"> '
date: last-modified	
format: 
  html: 
    theme: default
  pdf: default
bibliography: references.bib   
---



## Course information

**Course:** Course Title  
**Instructor:** Instructor Name  
**Email:** instructor@email.ca  
**Office hours:** TBD  
**Class time/location:** TBD  

## Course description

Add a short course description here.

## Learning objectives

By the end of this course, students should be able to:

- explain core concepts using appropriate terminology
- apply course methods to real or realistic problems
- interpret results clearly and accurately
- communicate findings in a reproducible format
- reflect on assumptions, limitations, and uncertainty

## Course materials

Required and recommended materials will be listed here.

## Assessment

| Component | Weight |
|---|---:|
| Assignments | XX% |
| Quizzes | XX% |
| Midterm | XX% |
| Final project/exam | XX% |
| Participation | XX% |

## Course policies

Add policies for attendance, late work, academic integrity, use of AI tools, accessibility, and communication expectations.

## Recommended Textbooks

- @devore2021modern
- @diez2016openintro
